languages.text: [Добить Ларию] "Бог-Император, милость Твоя да осенит умирающую".
[Finish Laria] "God-Emperor, may Your mercy grace the dying."
languages.original_text: [Добить Ларию] "Бог-Император, милость Твоя да осенит умирающую".

traits.locale_text: [Finish Laria] "God-Emperor, may Your mercy grace the dying."

[Finish Laria] "God-Emperor, may Your mercy grace the dying."

languages.text: 【了结菈丽雅】“神皇啊，愿您的慈悲降临垂死之人。”
languages.original_text: [Finish Laria] "God-Emperor, may Your mercy grace the dying."

traits.locale_text: 【了结菈丽雅】“神皇啊，愿您的慈悲降临垂死之人。”

languages.text: [Rematar a Laria] «Dios Emperador, concede tu misericordia a los moribundos».
languages.original_text: [Finish Laria] "God-Emperor, may Your mercy grace the dying."

traits.locale_text: [Rematar a Laria] «Dios Emperador, concede tu misericordia a los moribundos».

languages.text: [Achever Laria] « Empereur-Dieu, puissiez-vous accorder votre miséricorde aux mourants. »
languages.original_text: [Finish Laria] "God-Emperor, may Your mercy grace the dying."

traits.locale_text: [Achever Laria] « Empereur-Dieu, puissiez-vous accorder votre miséricorde aux mourants. »

languages.text: [Laria'nın işini bitir] "Tanrı İmparator'un merhameti, ölmekte olanı onurlandırsın."
languages.original_text: [Finish Laria] "God-Emperor, may Your mercy grace the dying."

traits.locale_text: [Laria'nın işini bitir] "Tanrı İmparator'un merhameti, ölmekte olanı onurlandırsın."

languages.text: [Laria erlösen] "Gottimperator, mögest du den Sterbenden gnädig sein."
languages.original_text: [Finish Laria] "God-Emperor, may Your mercy grace the dying."

traits.locale_text: [Laria erlösen] "Gottimperator, mögest du den Sterbenden gnädig sein."

languages.text: [ラリアを終わらせる]「神皇帝、死にかけている者たちに慈悲を注いでください」
languages.original_text: [Finish Laria] "God-Emperor, may Your mercy grace the dying."

traits.locale_text: [ラリアを終わらせる]「神皇帝、死にかけている者たちに慈悲を注いでください」
